ParamQueryPage.name: page
ParamQueryPage.description: To get the list of tasks from the respective pages. The default value is 1. Possible values: Positive integer values only.

ParamQueryPerPage.name: per_page
ParamQueryPerPage.description: Specify how many tasks to return per page. The default and the maximum possible value is 200.

ParamQueryFeatureType.name: feature_type
ParamQueryFeatureType.description: To retrieve tasks based on their feature type.

ParamQueryModule.name: module
ParamQueryModule.description: To retrieve tasks based on their module.

ParamQueryIds.name: ids
ParamQueryIds.description: It represents the unique ID of the task that you want to delete. Skip this parameter if you have specified the ID in the request URL. You can pass upto 10 comma-separated IDs in this parameter.
